task_description: Create msp.html page for Manulife Saving Protector product in /pages/ directory with comprehensive product content in question format, premium tables, error-free calculator using lookup table approach, and keyword color highlighting.

verification.summary: Static HTML site - no build system. File exists (1016 lines), all key elements verified: calculator with lookup data (MSP_DATA object), dark mode support (21 html.dark rules), header/footer component loading, main.js integration, FAQ accordion (10 items), ADB cap enforcement, minimum premi validation, keyword highlighting with multiple colors. Review feedback addressed.

review_feedback_applied: 2025-01-20: Added innerHTML safety comment and Year 5 tunai/death-benefit footnote per review. Death benefit formula and mode-change UX left unchanged per task spec.
